The '''''Larkhess''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|escort frigate]]<ref name="TT Sourcebook" /> in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet.

==History==
The ''Larkhess'' was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Afyon]] and around [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] it was of many warships reassigned and modified for cargo [[Transport/Legends|transport]] to stimulate [[galactic economy]]. To make room for the additional cargo, the crew was reduced to fifteen men. During that time the ship housed many different [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] and the often arrogant attitude of the young hot-shot pilots led to friction with the crew and embitterment of Captain Afyon.<ref name="TT Sourcebook" />

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], during the [[Thrawn campaign|conflict]] between the New Republic and [[Imperial Remnant]] reunified under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] the ship was still assigned to cargo duty. Prior to the [[Battle of Sluis Van]], the ship housed the famed [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing fighter squadron]] known as [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].<ref name="HTTE">''[[Heir to the Empire]]''</ref> During the battle Afyon and his ship performed well, even with only a skeleton crew, but the ''Larkhess'' was ultimately captured by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Afyon had prepared to destroy the frigate rather than letting it fall into enemy hands, but the actions of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] prevented this,<ref name="TT Sourcebook" /> but crippled the ship in the process.<ref name="HTTE" />
